title: Exodus 2120
leftText: The world is ending. Some of humanity escapes on generational starships bound for new planetary systems. These are the stories of those who did — and those left behind.
rightText: Explore themes of survival, identity, and what it means to be human when everything familiar is left behind. Add your chapter to this living universe.

title: Lockdown
imageAlt: Doctor wearing mask and Corona virus
leftText: A global pandemic rewrites the rules of society. In a world of masks and borders, ordinary people navigate extraordinary choices. Whose side are you on?
rightText: Stories set in the lockdown era explore fear, community, resistance, and survival. Add your perspective — your character is waiting to be born.
quote: "The smallest voices carry the greatest truths."

title: Being Super
imageAlt: Goddess Kaali resembling Good and Evil side of super-powers
leftText: A cosmic alignment — once in 5,000 years — grants random people super-powers. The last one gave us gods and demons of Greek & Hindu mythologies. This time it's your neighbour. Or you.
rightText: Rooted in Greek and Hindu mythology, this universe explores whether power reveals or corrupts character. Heroes. Villains. The line between them is yours to draw.
quote: "Power doesn't change you. It reveals you."
